description:
EIM GUI: Cross-Platform ESP-IDF Installation Manager


What's Changed
- Replaced the action we used for the github release assets upload with direct calling of the gh cli util by @Hahihula in #582
- added gh to release runners by @Hahihula in #584
- added GH_TOKEN to release pipeline by @Hahihula in #585
- changed repository ownership in release pipeline by @Hahihula in #587
- fixed execution shell in the release pipeline by @Hahihula in #588
- fix release pipeline naming by @Hahihula in #592
Full Changelog: v0.10.1...v0.10.3
